description: Perform a viewshed analysis to determine the visible area from a proposed fire lookout tower. Load the Digital Elevation Model (DEM) from /home/ga/GIS_Data/rasters/srtm_41_19.tif and reproject it to WGS 84 / UTM zone 34S (EPSG:32734), saving the result to /home/ga/GIS_Data/rasters/dem_reprojected.tif. Identify the highest elevation point in the reprojected DEM to serve as the observer location. Generate a visibility map using an observer height of 10 meters, a target height of 0 meters, and an analysis radius of 20 kilometers. Save the final viewshed raster to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/fire_lookout_viewshed.tif.
